title: Model routing configuration
description: Validates the JSON representation of docs/model-routing-guidelines.md's per-agent default-class table, fallback policy, and (optionally) a project-local override supplement. Extraction is done by the lint script before validation.

version.description: Routing-table semver; bumped when defaults change

binding.description: Whether the file is the binding default (true) or a project-local override (false). Per spec clarification 5, the upstream table is binding for fresh scaffolds.

frontier_only_when.description: Plain-language predicate for when this agent escalates to the frontier tier

claude_equivalent.description: Claude Code fallback alias for this agent's default_class (e.g. sonnet, haiku, opus)

openai_equivalent.description: OpenAI class abstraction used in Codex

gemini_equivalent.description: Gemini class abstraction used in opencode

triggers.description: Per spec clarification 8: credit exhaustion OR provider unavailability

substitution_policy.description: Per spec clarification 8; closest peer in same class first, then one tier down

log_path.description: Live JSONL log path (FR-020); monthly rollover handled by archive-registers.sh

project_local_override_marker.description: Required when binding == false; identifies the file as a project-local override per spec clarification 5
